race_meta.race_name: Irish Stallion Farms EBF (Pro/Am) Auction INH Flat Race (IRE Incentive Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed jury time at position 2 (25.0% probability) vs top pick Border Lad (35.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~10.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Border Lad > Jury Time, but actual result was Jury Time > Border Lad. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Jury Time had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 0.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
